title: spilotantha leathersii
side_effects: Spilotantha leathersii can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can lead to allergic reactions, respiratory issues, and even liver damage. Improper preparation and dosage of the plant's extracts can also cause stomach ulcers, diarrhea, and vomiting. In severe cases, misuse of Spilotantha leathersii can result in seizures, coma, or even death.
